title: iMessage Channel Config
description: Configuration for the macOS iMessage channel adapter. Requires Full Disk Access (to read ~/Library/Messages/chat.db) and macOS Automation consent (to send via Messages.app via osascript).

poll_interval_ms.description: How often (in milliseconds) to poll chat.db for new inbound messages. Clamped to [500, 60000]. Default: 2000.

allowed_handles.description: Optional allow-list of phone numbers or emails (case-insensitive). When non-empty, only messages from these senders are surfaced.
